We need to output a plain text record with three key=value lines. The fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we need to output:

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

We must not add headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. So just those three lines. Also we need to include packet_id? The instructions say "Return the three-line status record." The fields are route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. The packet_id may be part of the request but not part of the status record? The instructions say: "Return a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move." So we ignore packet_id.

Thus final answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra spaces at beginning, no newline after last line? Probably it's fine. We'll produce exactly three lines.

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
